creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Hi joneum,

Thank you for committing this.

Insert previous rant (bug #223849, comment #7) here regarding the gratuitous change from PORTVERSION to DISTVERSION.

Also, what is the reason for the change to the timestamp in the distinfo? I can understand that you may wish to verify that the distinfo I submitted is valid since you are accountable for the commit. However, you can do that without changing the patch I submitted. Every change you make to my patch shows up as a conflict in my tree, which I then have to investigate and reconcile.
